schemaVersion.description: 1 = original index. 2 = MAY include sandbox_image_digest and network_policy_used per entry, telling verifiers exactly which sandbox the miner used so they can match. Both versions are otherwise identical.

entries.description: Map codeHash (0x + 64 hex, lowercase) to fetch instructions.

benchmark_inline_path.description: Path inside extracted tarball to the benchmark log file whose SHA-256 must match benchmarkLogHash.

sandbox_image_digest.description: Container image the miner ran the trial in, as `name@sha256:<digest>`. When set, verifiers SHOULD use this exact image (overriding both ARAH_SANDBOX_IMAGE and protocol.environment.sandbox.image) to maximize reproducibility. If absent, verifiers fall back to env / protocol / harness default.

network_policy_used.description: networkPolicy the miner actually ran with. Verifiers MUST run with the same value (and must have ARAH_ALLOW_FULL_NETWORK=1 for `full`); a divergence here is a common source of false rejects. Note `unknown` is not allowed here — by the time a proposal is on-chain, the miner knows exactly which policy produced the metric.
